findings: 发现 5 个未被现有 ISS 明确覆盖的 command-surface 漂移：install/uninstall 旧 flag、已移除 hooks 命令残留、CLI drift gate 覆盖缺口，以及 force-only 安装参数残留。

issues_found.title: Install 文档和 test seed 仍要求已移除的 --plan/--reapply/--force/--scope 参数
issues_found.description: 当前注册的 install-v2 只声明 debug、dry-run、target、yes、global、url、enable-embed、embed-model；pipeline InitArgs 也没有 scope/reapply/force/plan。但 docs 仍把 fabric install --plan、--reapply、--force 和 install --scope project/user 当成当前用法或 invariant，用户照文档执行会进入 unknown flag/错误路径，test seed 也会驱动错误需求。证据：docs/getting-started.md:45 使用 fabric install --plan，docs/getting-started.md:46 使用 --reapply，docs/initialization.md:191 使用 --force，docs/test-seed/cli.md:44 要求 install --scope；实际参数见 packages/cli/src/commands/install-v2.ts:32 和 packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/types.ts:11。
issues_found.fix_direction: 把所有 install 预览指引统一为 --dry-run；删除 --reapply/--force/--scope 的当前用法说明，若需要保留历史迁移说明则标记为 retired，并更新 docs/test-seed/cli.md 的 I2/I3/I4/T3。

issues_found.title: CLI test seed 仍写 fabric uninstall --plan，但实现和测试已迁到 --dry-run
issues_found.description: docs/test-seed/cli.md 的 T7 仍定义 fabric uninstall --plan no-write contract；实际 uninstallCommand 只有 debug、dry-run、target、yes 四个参数，help snapshot 和单测也都使用 uninstall --dry-run。这个种子会让后续测试生成或人工检查围绕不存在的 --plan 参数展开。
issues_found.fix_direction: 将 T7 改为 fabric uninstall --dry-run no-write contract，并同步描述中的 --plan 模式措辞；保留 buildUninstallExecutionPlan 的内部 plan 枚举测试为内部 API，而不是 CLI flag。

issues_found.title: Initialization guide 仍把已移除的 fabric hooks 当作可执行命令
issues_found.description: docs/initialization.md 有独立章节 `fabric hooks — re-apply hook install only` 并给出 fabric hooks 命令；但命令注册表没有 hooks 子命令，docs/test-seed/cli.md 也明确说顶层 fabric hooks 已在 rc.15 移除。集成测试里仍保留“fabric hooks command is idempotent”描述，虽然实际调用的是 installHooks helper，会继续误导维护者认为存在公共 hooks 命令。
issues_found.fix_direction: 删除或改写 fabric hooks 章节，改成 rerun fabric install 或内部 installHooks helper；把相关测试 describe/comment 改成 helper idempotency，避免暗示 CLI 命令仍存在。

issues_found.title: CLI --help drift gate 没有覆盖当前文档声明的 store/sync/info 公共命令
issues_found.description: docs/testing-architecture.md 声称 cli-surface.test.ts 会快照 fabric store --help、fabric sync --help、fabric info --help；当前 docs/test-seed/cli.md 也把 store/sync/info 列为 public commands。但 cli-surface.test.ts 只导入 install/doctor/uninstall/config，并断言 public command set exactly {install, doctor, uninstall, config}。这使新增公共命令的 help/flag 漂移不会被该护栏发现。
issues_found.fix_direction: 扩展 cli-surface.test.ts：从 registry 或显式导入覆盖 store/sync/info（必要时覆盖 deprecated aliases 和 hidden/internal 分层），并把 public command set 断言更新为 docs/test-seed/cli.md §1 的当前集合。

issues_found.title: force-only install 参数在文章和 i18n 中残留为当前能力
issues_found.description: docs/articles/agents-md-to-fabric-knowledge-loop.md 的常用参数仍包含 fabric install --force-skills-only，并解释它用于只刷新 Skill 模板；en/zh-CN locale 也保留 --force-skills-only 和 --force-hooks-only 的帮助、banner、错误文案。但 install-v2 的 args 不注册这些参数，旧 install.ts 注释也说明 single-slice refresh flags 已移除。虽然部分 locale 可能只是未使用残留，但会污染翻译和文档搜索结果。
issues_found.fix_direction: 删除文章中的 --force-skills-only 用法，改为当前推荐的 fabric install 重跑或明确历史说明；清理或隔离 locale 中已移除 flag 的文案，若必须保留兼容键则加 retired 注释并确保不会出现在用户 help/docs。

findings: 手动补扫发现 3 个 knowledge/tool terminology 漂移：MCP runtime annotation 仍叫 rule sections，protected-token lint 仍钉旧两步编辑入口，cocos fixture 仍教授 fab_get_rules/.fabric/agents。

issues_found.title: fab_get_knowledge_sections runtime contract still calls itself rule-section filtering
issues_found.description: 当前公开 MCP tool 名已经是 fab_get_knowledge_sections，server index 也把它描述为 fetch full bodies for stable_ids；但共享 annotations title 仍是 "Filter rule sections"，tool description 仍说 "Fabric rules" 和 "full rule content"。这不是旧文档，而是会暴露给 MCP client 的 runtime contract，会继续把 knowledge/store-era surface 混回 rule-section 心智模型。
issues_found.fix_direction: 把 annotations title 改成类似 "Fetch knowledge entry bodies"，同步更新 packages/server/src/tools/knowledge-sections.ts 的 description，统一用 knowledge entries / bodies / stable_ids，不再用 rule sections / Fabric rules。

issues_found.title: Protected-token lint still protects the retired two-step edit bootstrap instead of fab_recall-first contract
issues_found.description: lint-protected-tokens.ts 的 bootstrap 必备 token 仍只有 fab_plan_context、fab_get_knowledge_sections 和 .fabric/events.jsonl，并在注释中说 bootstrap 只需要标明 "which two MCP tools to call on edit"；对应测试的 VALID_BOOTSTRAP_SOURCE 也把 fab_plan_context -> fab_get_knowledge_sections 写成修改前必须调用的有效 bootstrap。当前 canonical bootstrap 已改成 fab_recall 优先，只有正文过多时才走两步。这个 lint 会放过缺失 fab_recall 的旧 bootstrap，并把旧流程作为 valid fixture 固化。
issues_found.fix_direction: 把 BOOTSTRAP_REQUIRED_TOKENS 改为至少包含 fab_recall，并更新注释和测试 fixture：默认 edit 前入口是 fab_recall(paths)，fab_plan_context -> fab_get_knowledge_sections 只是回退。

issues_found.title: Cocos init-context fixture still teaches the removed fab_get_rules and .fabric/agents shadow protocol
issues_found.description: packages/cli/__tests__/fixtures/cocos-stub/AGENTS.md 仍把 .fabric/agents/ 当作 authoritative home，并要求修改前调用 fab_get_rules(path=<target file>)。当前主线已经使用 .fabric/knowledge / mounted stores、fab_recall 和 fab_get_knowledge_sections；该 fixture 若继续作为 init-context / shadow-mirroring 测试样本，会让测试和生成文档保留 v1 shadow protocol。
issues_found.fix_direction: 若该 fixture 只是历史迁移样本，文件名或注释应显式标记 legacy-v1；若仍作为当前 init-context 样本，应改成 fab_recall / mounted knowledge store 语义，并删除 .fabric/agents authoritative 描述。

findings: 发现 5 个 server/HTTP surface drift：quarantine 恢复说明过期、dashboard copy 工具清单残留、workspace 声明矛盾、HTTP 测试头仍列已删 endpoint、Dashboard conventions 指向已删除包。

issues_found.title: HTTP quarantine 恢复说明仍停留在 Part 1，指向已搬走的 mainline HTTP 实现
issues_found.description: `packages/server-http-experimental/README.md` 仍说 HTTP server 还在 `packages/server/src/` 且 Part 2 未来才会搬迁；但 main server 入口注释已说明 `startHttpServer` 被 quarantine，serve-lock 已完全搬到 `packages/server-http-experimental/`，并且 experimental 包已有 `src/http.ts`。维护者按 README 恢复步骤会从错误位置 surgical merge。
issues_found.fix_direction: 把 README 的 Part 1/Part 2 叙述改为当前状态：HTTP app、bearer-auth、serve-lock、integration tests 已在 experimental 包；恢复步骤应从 experimental 包迁回或重新注册，而不是从 `packages/server/src/http.ts` 取。同步修正 `packages/server/src/index.ts:381` 的 `./http.ts` 过期注释。

issues_found.title: Tooling manifest 仍登记已删除的 dashboard static copy build script
issues_found.description: `docs/tooling-manifest.md` 和 machine-readable `docs/tooling-manifest.json` 仍把 `copy-dashboard-dist` 描述为 server build 的 dashboard asset bridge，路径是 `packages/server/scripts/copy-dashboard.mjs`；但当前 `packages/server/package.json` 的 build 只有 `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean`，server 包也没有 scripts 目录。这会把维护者引向不存在的 Dashboard/HTTP build surface。
issues_found.fix_direction: 删除或归档 `copy-dashboard-dist` manifest 条目；若保留为历史信息，明确标记为 quarantined/removed，并从 machine-readable manifest 中移出 active tools 列表。

issues_found.title: Root workspace 声明与 pnpm workspace 对 server-http-experimental 的 quarantine 边界不一致
issues_found.description: 根 `package.json` 仍声明 npm-style `workspaces: ["packages/*"]`，会把 `packages/server-http-experimental` 纳入支持 package.json workspaces 的工具；但 `pnpm-workspace.yaml` 明确用 `!packages/server-http-experimental` 排除该包，并注释说 `pnpm -r build/test/tsc` 要跳过它。不同 workspace 消费者看到的 HTTP quarantine 边界不一致。
issues_found.fix_direction: 统一 workspace source of truth：要么移除 root `package.json` 的宽泛 workspaces 字段并只保留 `pnpm-workspace.yaml`，要么改成显式列表/排除策略，并在 README 中说明只有 pnpm workspace 定义有效。

issues_found.title: HTTP integration test header 仍把已删除的 `/api/intent/annotate` 列为 exercised endpoint
issues_found.description: `http-endpoints.test.ts` 文件头宣称测试会 exercise `POST /api/intent/annotate`，但同一文件后面明确写着该 endpoint 在 rc.5 A2 已移除且 orphan tests deleted。这个注释让 retired REST surface 看起来仍是当前测试契约的一部分。
issues_found.fix_direction: 从文件头 endpoint 清单删除 `/api/intent/annotate`，或移动到 removed-history 小节并重新编号剩余 endpoint，避免测试契约与移除说明互相矛盾。

issues_found.title: Conventions 仍把已删除 `packages/dashboard` 当作现行 UI token source
issues_found.description: `docs/CONVENTIONS.md` 要求 Dashboard 视觉 token 以 `packages/dashboard/src/styles/tokens.css` 为准，并保留 Dashboard 观察优先约束；但 `docs/CODEBASE_LANDSCAPE.md` 已说明 `packages/dashboard` 在 v2.0.0-rc.37 随 HTTP/REST/SSE quarantine 后不再存在于主线 packages。UI/HTTP 恢复前，这条 convention 指向已删除主线包。
issues_found.fix_direction: 将 Dashboard 相关 convention 标记为 quarantined historical reference，改指 `packages/server-http-experimental` 中的历史素材或删除 active 约束；未来恢复 Web UI 时再建立新的 token source。

findings: 发现 3 个新的 install/hook/skill source drift：Cursor 活跃 bootstrap 副本仍是旧长版规则；fabric-archive gate ref 与测试仍验证 retired archive-hint 名；store-backed 写路径已生效但 archive/review/import skill 热路径仍指向本地 .fabric/knowledge/pending。

issues_found.title: Active Cursor bootstrap managed block is stale relative to canonical store-only bootstrap
issues_found.description: The checked-in active Cursor rule still contains the old long-form bootstrap block with project-local `.fabric/knowledge/pending/`, `fabric doctor --fix`, self-archive marker, optional `KB:` cite-line, and cite-coverage details. Current root AGENTS/canonical bootstrap says knowledge may only be written to mounted stores and pending entries go to the current write store. Install tests also assert Cursor's managed block body should byte-equal `BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL`, so the repository's generated Cursor copy is drifted and will instruct Cursor users differently from Codex/AGENTS.
issues_found.fix_direction: Regenerate or replace `.cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc` from `BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL`, and add a repo-level drift check for checked-in generated client bootstrap copies.

issues_found.title: fabric-archive trigger-gate docs and tests still validate retired `archive-hint.cjs`
issues_found.description: The active installer and hook config docs install/register `fabric-hint.cjs` and treat `archive-hint.cjs` only as a historical name, but the fabric-archive Phase 1.5 gate reference still says E1 hook_passive comes from `archive-hint.cjs`. The integration test asserts that retired name, so tests now protect stale source text instead of current install behavior.
issues_found.fix_direction: Change E1 wording and regression expectations to `fabric-hint.cjs`; keep `archive-hint.cjs` only in explicitly historical migration notes.

issues_found.title: Store-backed pending write path conflicts with skill templates that still glob project-local `.fabric/knowledge/pending`
issues_found.description: The MCP/server path now persists and reviews pending entries under the resolved write-target store, and AGENTS says non-store knowledge roots must not be written. However fabric-review's default pending flow still tells the agent to `Glob .fabric/knowledge/pending/**/*.md`, while fabric-archive/import descriptions and guardrails still name `.fabric/knowledge/pending` as the destination. In a mounted-store project this can make review/import/archive agents look in the wrong tree or preserve obsolete protected tokens.
issues_found.fix_direction: Update skill descriptions, protected-token lists, and review backlog discovery to use `fab_review action="list"` / returned `pending_path` from the resolved write store, not direct project-local globbing.

findings: 发现 3 个 schema/metadata 合约漂移问题：issue source 值混用、store counters 文档仍指向 retired agents.meta 位置、active_project 未按 scope/project-id 规则校验却被写入 semantic_scope。

issues_found.title: Issue registry mixes source=discovery and source=discover
issues_found.description: 现有 .workflow/issues/issues.jsonl 同时持久化旧记录 source: "discovery" 和新记录 source: "discover"，例如第 1 行与第 188 行。按 source 过滤、去重或迁移时会把同一 discovery 来源拆成两个来源，且没有看到该文件内有迁移归一。
issues_found.fix_direction: 确定唯一 canonical source 值，迁移历史 JSONL 记录，并让 discovery/dedup 写入路径和查询过滤统一使用同一个枚举；如需兼容旧值，应在读路径做 alias 归一并加回归测试。

issues_found.title: Counter storage documentation still describes retired agents.meta counters
issues_found.description: docs/data-schema.md 仍说 counters 存在每个 meta file 的 counters key 下；但 store-counters.ts 明确说明 <projectRoot>/.fabric/agents.meta.json#counters 已 retired，stable_id counter 已移动到 store 根的 counters.json，store.ts 也把 countersFile 定义为 counters.json。该文档会误导恢复/迁移操作去修 agents.meta 而不是 store counters ledger。
issues_found.fix_direction: 更新 docs/data-schema.md 的 counters envelope 章节：把存储位置改为每个 store 根的 counters.json，说明 AgentsMetaCountersSchema 仅作为 envelope shape 复用，并链接 reconcileStoreCounters/store-counters.ts。

issues_found.title: active_project config accepts values that violate semantic_scope/project id contract
issues_found.description: fabric-config.ts 将 active_project 定义为任意 z.string()，但 cross-store-write.ts 会直接拼成 semantic_scope: project:${activeProject}；scope.ts 要求 scope coordinate 只能是小写 [a-z0-9_-] 分段，store.ts 也要求 store project id 是同样的小写单段。手工配置或坏写入可通过 config schema，随后写出 schema-invalid semantic_scope 并破坏 project filter/doctor lint 的一致性。
issues_found.fix_direction: 把 active_project schema 收紧为 STORE_PROJECT_ID_PATTERN 或复用单段 scope schema；在 resolveWriteScopeMeta 写出前用 scopeCoordinateSchema 校验 project:${activeProject}，并为手工 invalid active_project 配置添加拒绝/诊断测试。
